Name: Music Salon
Notes: What: An Afternoon with Ensemble Brio When: Sunday, April 26, 2026 Time: 3;00 p.m. Mark your calendars for an afternoon with Ensemble Brio featuring Steve Rosenberg, performing dazzling recorder solos, and joined by amazing countertenor, Jose Lemos, viola player, Mary Anne Ballard, percussionist, Danny Mallon, and harpsichordist, Julia Harlow. The ensemble will be performing some of their past repertoire from festival concerts and tours. This program features music from the Medieval, Renaissance and Baroque eras, as well as Sephardic songs and dances from early Spain. Tickets will go on sale early March. Space will be limited.

Name: The Lafayette Soirée
Notes: The Spring’s most anticipated event – the Lafayette Soirée – is set for Saturday, May 16, 2026. What: The Lafayette Soirée When: Saturday, May 16, 2026 Time: 6PM to 10PM Tickets will be available early April.
